text:
感動したぜっ！
<%me>よっ！
モニターにかじりついて見てたぜ！

……あ、さっきも言ったっけ？
でも何度でも言いたいくらい
マジで感動したんだって！

実際、あそこでボコれば確実だよな！
ホント目のつけどころが違うぜ！

なんかオレも無性に攻めたくなってきた
気がするぜ……

止めても無駄だぞ！
見てて

<%me>!
That was freakin'... moving!
My eyes were locked on the monitor!

Yeah, I know I already told you that! It was so
cool I'll probably end up tellin' you again,
pal! Deal with it!

But look, seein' you beat down that thing
removed all doubt. You got your eyes on
glory I can't dream of.

And seein' that kinda makes me wanna start
fightin' just as ridiculously hard as you do!

Just try and stop me, pal!
Watch and be amazed!
